label: The Pike Lockroom
description: The Pike Lockroom occupies a back chamber of The Quenched Pike, walled in broken ancient stone faced with later blackened brick and riveted iron strapping. Heavy plank shelving and iron pegs carry bundled hafts, spare bow-staves, and sealed tins of oil and resin, each marked with chalked inventory tallies. A narrow bench and a pegged tool board formalize maintenance work without displaying wares, while a small license-stone plaque records storage limits and inspection dates. The air remains saturated with char, metal filings, and old wood, and the floor is protected by scarred mats to catch grit and dripped quench-water.
